_comment: Curated categories + descriptions for the profile README. The generator (.github/scripts/generate-readme.mjs) fills the <!-- PROJECTS --> / <!-- STATS --> blocks in README.md from the live GitHub API. Add a new repo's name to a category here to place it; any owned public repo NOT listed appears automatically under '🆕 Uncategorized'. A description here overrides the repo's GitHub description.

descriptions.ultradoc: Grounded Q&A + citation-checked reference docs for any OSS project, from its real source, issues & PRs.
descriptions.ultraindex: Indexes a whole repo into an AI-navigable encyclopedia (map + per-module entries + link-graph) for huge codebases.
descriptions.ultrasearch: Keyless multi-backend web research → citation-checked, tiered Markdown/HTML report (5 modes + deep-research tier).
descriptions.ultrasec: Cross-file security-audit agent: source→sink taint + Trivy/Semgrep/gitleaks/osv, adversarially verified into a cited report.
descriptions.ultra11y: Audits HTML/CSS/JSX for RGAA 4.1.2 + WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA with a zero-dependency static engine + agent judgment.
descriptions.construct: Turns a product idea into a grounded, buildable SRD/PRD suite (skills.sh agent skill).
descriptions.reconstruct: Analyzes any repo and generates reconstruction PRDs to rebuild it from scratch.
descriptions.feelc: AI-native DMN/FEEL business-rules engine in Go: an LLM writes the rules, the engine proves & runs them deterministically (WASM playground).
descriptions.conforme: Syncs your AI coding config (rules, skills, agents, MCP servers) across Claude Code, Cursor & more (Rust).
descriptions.claudfeine: Runs Claude Code (and Codex) caffeinated — keeps the machine awake for exactly the session, cross-platform & zero-dep.
descriptions.claude-code-switch: Zero-dependency provider switching for Claude Code (Anthropic, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Z.AI, Kimi, Qwen…).
descriptions.git-pilot: AI-powered git automation: smart commits, conflict resolution & auto-rebase (Claude/Codex/OpenAI/Gemini/Mistral). Pure Bash.
descriptions.git-recap: Monthly commit-recap generator with AI summaries, bullet points and commit lists.
descriptions.llm-models: Fetches the latest LLM models from the OpenRouter and models.dev APIs.
descriptions.andro: Run Android apps (phone & TV) from the macOS CLI on a disposable, self-contained emulator (Apple Silicon, HVF). (Rust)
descriptions.brutifi: High-performance WiFi security-testing tool in Rust for educational and authorized audits.
descriptions.rshc: Rust reimplementation of SHC: encrypts shell scripts into compiled binaries.
descriptions.subtool: All-in-one subtitle CLI: download, translate, convert, sync, clean, merge, fix, extract & embed.
descriptions.snatch: Universal video downloader: yt-dlp first, CDP browser extraction fallback for stubborn sites.
descriptions.web-watcher: Bash watcher for APIs & websites with diff detection, thresholds and instant notifications.
descriptions.package-checker.sh: Scans node/bun/deno projects for vulnerable npm packages via OSV/GHSA (JSON/CSV/PURL/SBOM/SARIF/TRIVY).
descriptions.github-helpers: GitHub maintenance toolkit: bulk unstar, org clone, fork cleanup, repo audit and more.
descriptions.copyable-pdf: Converts scanned PDFs into searchable, copyable PDFs with Tesseract OCR (parallel).
descriptions.ratio-master: Torrent ratio tool that sends real HTTP announce requests to BitTorrent trackers.
descriptions.unsleep: Tiny executable that prevents the machine from sleeping.
descriptions.db-schema-viewer: Client-side DB-schema visualizer with AI analysis — upload SQL, visualize, share, export, no backend.
descriptions.real-estate-calculator: Real-estate ROI calculator for rental-property profitability.
descriptions.loyalty-card-vault: Offline-first PWA for loyalty cards with encrypted storage and barcode scanning.
descriptions.omnilingo: Desktop language-learning app with multi-provider AI tutoring.
descriptions.feedreel: Local-first daily short-video generator (Remotion) with per-platform captions + opt-in Shorts/TikTok/Reels publishing.
descriptions.binance-historical: Fetch historical klines from the Binance API.
descriptions.ai-strategy-backtester: Describe a crypto strategy in plain English → JSON strategy, backtested over 50+ indicators with HTML reports.
descriptions.regressio: Zero-dep TS regression/classification/stats (OLS, Ridge, Lasso, Logistic, KNN, NN) with a Rust/WASM engine.
descriptions.similarities: Functions to find similarities between arrays.
descriptions.benford-law: Check whether a dataset follows Benford's law.
descriptions.node-simple-context: Minimalist context for Node, inspired by the React Context API.
descriptions.react-essentials-functions: Useful hooks and components for React.
descriptions.rn-date: Zero-dependency fix for date-parsing issues in React Native on Android.
descriptions.rn-simple-modal: Lightweight, zero-dependency React Native modal (no animation).
descriptions.huge-async-storage: async-storage wrapper for storing huge data in React Native.
descriptions.insta-who-unfollowed-me: Track who unfollowed you on Instagram.
descriptions.release-notes-finder: Find npm-package versions with their GitHub release notes.
descriptions.github-change-json: Action to change a value in a JSON file (e.g. package.json).
descriptions.github-commit-push-file: Action to commit and push a file to a repository.
descriptions.github-multi-deployments: Action to manage deployment statuses across multiple environments.
descriptions.typescript-swc-starter: Minimalist TypeScript + SWC starter emitting CJS and ESM packages.
descriptions.typescript-react-lib-swc: Minimalist TS + SWC starter for building React component libraries.
descriptions.leboncoin-cdp: Undetectable Leboncoin scraper via Chrome DevTools Protocol & Next.js data routes — no Puppeteer, zero bot detection.
descriptions.awesome-stars: Curated list of repositories I've liked on GitHub.
descriptions.homebrew-tap: Homebrew tap for my CLI tools (`brew install maxgfr/tap/…`).
